category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Greece EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入希腊：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入希臘：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Greece (ELOT/RAAEY/IPTO/HEDNO) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, AFIR public-charging obligations, and national installation rules.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与希腊（ELOT/RAAEY/IPTO/HEDNO）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求、AFIR公共充电义务和国家安装规则。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與希臘（ELOT/RAAEY/IPTO/HEDNO）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求、AFIR公共充電義務和國家安裝規則。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Greece (ELOT/RAAEY/IPTO/HEDNO) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行希腊（ELOT/RAAEY/IPTO/HEDNO）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行希臘（ELOT/RAAEY/IPTO/HEDNO）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Greece-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) obligations for public charging, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection, and Greek installation and IPTO/HEDNO grid-operator coordination under RAAEY oversight. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness and Piraeus is the primary entry port. Greek-language documentation is often expected for installation and end-user materials.
answer_first.zh: 对于希腊，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）公共充电义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护，以及RAAEY监管下希腊安装与IPTO/HEDNO并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备，比雷埃夫斯为主要入境口岸。安装及最终用户资料通常需要希腊语文档。
answer_first.zht: 對於希臘，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）公共充電義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護，以及RAAEY監管下希臘安裝與IPTO/HEDNO併網/項目協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備，比雷埃夫斯為主要入境口岸。安裝及最終用戶資料通常需要希臘語文檔。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
